articles.title: Citywide needle pickup requests fluctuated from 2020 to 2025, but surged in these neighborhoods
articles.description:
One Boston neighborhood saw a 149 percent increase in needles reported to the city through 311 over the last five years.

The post Citywide needle pickup requests fluctuated from 2020 to 2025, but surged in these neighborhoods appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Needle pickup requests in Boston increased significantly from 2020 to 2025.
One neighborhood reported a 149% rise in needles reported via 311.
Residents face heightened safety concerns due to increased needle presence.
